title: Coron vs El Nido: The Honest Answer from Someone Who's Done Both
description: El Nido built the legend. Coron inherited the soul. We've been to both — as a couple, as a family, with in-laws, and with our dog. Here's the honest answer on which Palawan is right for your trip.
imageAlt: Couple at Twin Lagoon, Coron — crystal-clear water and limestone karsts
